'''chofadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiatiflorous|labiatiflorous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiatiflorous|labiatiflorous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chofadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofadhithi|chofadhithi]] || [[word:chofadhiji|chofadhiji]] || [[word:chofadhishi|chofadhishi]] || [[word:chofadhiki|chofadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofadhuthuthu|chofadhuthuthu]] || [[word:chofadhujuju|chofadhujuju]] || [[word:chofadhushushu|chofadhushushu]] || [[word:chofadhukuku|chofadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofadhuthu|chofadhuthu]] || [[word:chofadhuju|chofadhuju]] || [[word:chofadhushu|chofadhushu]] || [[word:chofadhuku|chofadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofadhufthuf|chofadhufthuf]] || [[word:chofadhufjuf|chofadhufjuf]] || [[word:chofadhufshuf|chofadhufshuf]] || [[word:chofadhufkuf|chofadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofadhethe|chofadhethe]] || [[word:chofadheje|chofadheje]] || [[word:chofadheshe|chofadheshe]] || [[word:chofadheke|chofadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofadhothotho|chofadhothotho]] || [[word:chofadhojojo|chofadhojojo]] || [[word:chofadhoshosho|chofadhoshosho]] || [[word:chofadhokoko|chofadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofadhotho|chofadhotho]] || [[word:chofadhojo|chofadhojo]] || [[word:chofadhosho|chofadhosho]] || [[word:chofadhoko|chofadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofadhofthof|chofadhofthof]] || [[word:chofadhofjof|chofadhofjof]] || [[word:chofadhofshof|chofadhofshof]] || [[word:chofadhofkof|chofadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfthĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfjĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfshĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfkĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfthĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfjĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfshĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfkĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfthĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfjĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfshĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chofadhĂŻfkĂŻf|chofadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofadhĂŠthĂŠ|chofadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chofadhĂŠjĂŠ|chofadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chofadhĂŠshĂŠ|chofadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chofadhĂŠkĂŠ|chofadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofadhathatha|chofadhathatha]] || [[word:chofadhajaja|chofadhajaja]] || [[word:chofadhashasha|chofadhashasha]] || [[word:chofadhakaka|chofadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofadhatha|chofadhatha]] || [[word:chofadhaja|chofadhaja]] || [[word:chofadhasha|chofadhasha]] || [[word:chofadhaka|chofadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofadhafthaf|chofadhafthaf]] || [[word:chofadhafjaf|chofadhafjaf]] || [[word:chofadhafshaf|chofadhafshaf]] || [[word:chofadhafkaf|chofadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chofadhasha|chofadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofadhshĂ«sha|chofadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofadhrosha|chofadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofadhmusha|chofadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofadhyasha|chofadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofadhnkshĂ«sha|gochofadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofadhnkrosha|gochofadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofadhnkmusha|gochofadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofadhnkyasha|gochofadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chofafadhasha|chofafadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofafadhshĂ«sha|chofafadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofafadhrosha|chofafadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofafadhmusha|chofafadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofafadhyasha|chofafadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofafadhnkshĂ«sha|gochofafadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofafadhnkrosha|gochofafadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofafadhnkmusha|gochofafadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofafadhnkyasha|gochofafadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chefĂŠdhasha|chefĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chefĂŠdhshĂ«sha|chefĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chefĂŠdhrosha|chefĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chefĂŠdhmusha|chefĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chefĂŠdhyasha|chefĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochefĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gochefĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochefĂŠdhnkrosha|gochefĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochefĂŠdhnkmusha|gochefĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochefĂŠdhnkyasha|gochefĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chofadhasha|chofadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofadhshĂ«sha|chofadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofadhrosha|chofadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofadhmusha|chofadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofadhyasha|chofadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofadhnkshĂ«sha|gochofadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofadhnkrosha|gochofadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofadhnkmusha|gochofadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofadhnkyasha|gochofadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
